_comment: PLACEHOLDER — Replace with a real paw-stamp Lottie animation.
_sources: LottieFiles.com: search 'paw', 'stamp', or 'pet like' → export JSON
Rive.app: create paw animation → export as Lottie JSON
Adobe After Effects + Bodymovin plugin → export JSON
_color_note: The code applies a colorFilter (BlendMode.srcIn) in LottieDelegates, so any single-color Lottie paw asset will automatically pick up AppColors.softTeal (#4DB6AC) when liked and grey when unliked. No manual color editing needed.
